item.title: AGI will be able to comprehend European mind.

item.title: @simonw @badlogicgames I guess you're the person to ask about this?

item.title: Anyone know whether OpenAI officially supports the use of the `/backend-api/codex/responses` endpoin...
item.description:
Anyone know whether OpenAI officially supports the use of the `/backend-api/codex/responses` endpoint that Pi and Opencode (IIUC) uses?
It doesn't seem to be documented, and was reverse engineered by @simonw - but is now used by some popular harnesses.
--- @jeremyphoward | ❤️ 5 | 🔁 0 | 💬 3 | 👁 1422
item.author: @jeremyphoward
